hero.headline: UPES Online MBA in Marketing Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) Online MBA with a Marketing Management specialisation. NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, UGC-DEB approved. Consumer Behaviour in Digital World, Sales and Channel Management, Digital Brand Management, Customer Relationship Management, Services Marketing, Digital Marketing, and Integrated Marketing Communication in Sem 3-4.

sections.tldr: UPES Online MBA Marketing Management: NIRF #45 University, NIRF #36 Management, NAAC A, fees Rs 1,75,000 (Year 1: Rs 95,000 / Year 2: Rs 80,000), zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month. Digital-forward marketing curriculum with Consumer Behaviour in Digital World, Digital Brand Management, CRM, Services Marketing, Digital Marketing, IMC, and Innovation and Entrepreneurship.

about.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Marketing Management is offered by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies, Dehradun. UPES holds NAAC A accreditation, NIRF #45 University ranking (2025), and NIRF #36 in Management (2025). The online programme is UGC-DEB approved.

The Marketing Management specialisation delivers dedicated Sem 3-4 subjects with a distinctly digital-forward orientation. Sem 3 covers Consumer Behaviour in Digital World, Sales and Channel Management, Digital Brand Management, Customer Relationship Management, and Services Marketing. Sem 4 covers Strategic Management, Digital Marketing, Integrated Marketing Communication, Innovation and Entrepreneurship, and Dissertation.

UPES's 20+ year legacy in industry-aligned education from Dehradun gives this programme strong NIRF Management rankings (#36 nationally) that outperform many better-known private university online programmes. Consumer Behaviour in Digital World as a Sem 3 subject title specifically signals the digital-era framing of the marketing curriculum - more contemporary than traditional consumer behaviour coverage at peer universities.

sem3Subjects.name: Consumer Behaviour in Digital World
sem3Subjects.description: Analyse online consumer decision journeys, digital influence patterns, and platform-driven buying behaviour for digital marketing strategy.

sem3Subjects.name: Sales and Channel Management
sem3Subjects.description: Design sales team structures, manage distribution channels, and apply channel analytics to multi-tier retail and B2B sales operations.

sem3Subjects.name: Digital Brand Management
sem3Subjects.description: Build digital brand equity, manage online reputation, and design social media brand strategy for omnichannel brand management roles.

sem3Subjects.name: Customer Relationship Management
sem3Subjects.description: Implement CRM platforms, design customer journey maps, and apply lifecycle marketing to customer acquisition and retention programmes.

sem3Subjects.name: Services Marketing
sem3Subjects.description: Apply service quality frameworks, manage service blueprinting, and design customer experience programmes for services and hospitality sectors.

sem4Subjects.name: Strategic Management
sem4Subjects.description: Develop marketing-led competitive strategy, evaluate brand portfolio decisions, and align marketing investment with business growth objectives.

sem4Subjects.name: Digital Marketing
sem4Subjects.description: Manage SEO, SEM, social media campaigns, email marketing, and performance analytics for digital acquisition and retention roles.

sem4Subjects.name: Integrated Marketing Communication
sem4Subjects.description: Design cross-channel messaging strategies, manage media mix planning, and integrate above-the-line and digital communications.

sem4Subjects.name: Innovation and Entrepreneurship
sem4Subjects.description: Apply innovation frameworks to marketing product development and build entrepreneurial marketing strategies for new ventures.

sem4Subjects.name: Dissertation
sem4Subjects.description: Complete an applied marketing research project on digital consumer behaviour, brand strategy, or CRM system effectiveness.

syllabus.note: Sem 1-2 shared core subjects across all UPES MBA specialisations. Core includes Managerial Economics, Accounting for Managers, Marketing Management, Quantitative Techniques, Operations Management, OB and HRM, Project Management, Financial Management, Research Methodology, and Business Analytics for Managers.

whoHires.body:
Marketing Management MBA graduates from UPES Online are hired across these industries and roles:

**Industries:** FMCG, E-commerce, Digital marketing agencies, BFSI marketing, EdTech growth, IT services marketing

**Entry-level roles:** Marketing Executive, Digital Marketing Analyst, Brand Executive, CRM Analyst, Sales Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Marketing Manager, Digital Brand Manager, CRM Manager, Sales Manager, Channel Manager

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CMO, Head of Marketing, VP Digital Marketing, Director Brand Strategy, Head of Growth

**Top hiring organisations (UPES alumni placements):** TCS, Infosys, HCL, Wipro, Deloitte, KPMG, and companies in FMCG, e-commerce, and digital marketing sectors. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking reflects strong industry connect with North India corporate sectors.

skills.body:
The UPES Marketing Management specialisation builds skills that digital-era marketing employers test at marketing manager levels:

**Technical skills:**
- Consumer Behaviour in Digital World: online purchase journey analysis, digital influence mapping, and platform-specific consumer insight for digital marketing strategy roles
- Digital Brand Management: online brand equity building, social media brand governance, and reputation management for brand management roles
- Customer Relationship Management: CRM platform implementation, customer journey mapping, and lifecycle marketing programme design for CRM manager roles
- Digital Marketing (Sem 4): SEO, SEM, social media marketing, email marketing, and performance analytics for digital acquisition roles

**Applied skills:**
- Sales and Channel Management: channel strategy design, sales team management, and distribution analytics for sales and channel manager roles
- Integrated Marketing Communication: media mix planning, cross-channel message integration, and ATL-to-digital IMC design for marketing communications roles

**Soft skills:** Presenting digital marketing ROI to CMO and business leadership, managing agency relationships, communicating brand positioning to sales teams, and building cross-functional campaign briefs for digital and creative teams.

comparisons.body:
Comparing UPES Online MBA Marketing Management against peers:

**vs Amity Online MBA Marketing:** Amity is NAAC A+ and NIRF #22 at Rs 2,25,000 with strong all-India brand recognition. UPES Marketing Management at Rs 1,75,000 is NIRF #36 in Management - a stronger management-category ranking than Amity despite the lower fee. UPES's Consumer Behaviour in Digital World, Digital Brand Management, and CRM as dedicated subjects reflect a more digital-forward Sem 3 curriculum than Amity's traditional marketing track.

**vs NMIMS Online MBA Marketing Management:** NMIMS carries strong Mumbai consumer brand recognition at Rs 1,60,000-1,95,000. For Mumbai FMCG and consumer brand careers, NMIMS carries stronger recognition. For North India IT services marketing, digital agency, and e-commerce roles, UPES Marketing Management at Rs 1,75,000 with NIRF #36 Management ranking is a competitive alternative.

**vs MUJ Online MBA Marketing:** MUJ is NAAC A+ at Rs 1,53,000-1,80,000 with Coursera Plus certifications. UPES Marketing Management includes Services Marketing as a dedicated subject and offers a Dissertation rather than just a project. UPES's NIRF #36 Management ranking is stronger than MUJ's management category standing.

fees.body:
The UPES Online MBA in Marketing Management has a total program fee of Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years (4 semesters).

**Year-wise fee schedule:**
- Year 1 (Semesters 1 and 2): Rs 95,000
- Year 2 (Semesters 3 and 4): Rs 80,000

**Zero-cost EMI (no-cost EMI available):**
- Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months
- Tenure options: 3 to 36 months
- Zero interest (0% cost EMI) through UPES NBFC lending tie-ups
- Contact our counsellor for current tenure options and approval terms

**Scholarships available (confirmed from UPES scholarships portal):**
- **Academic/Work Experience scholarship**: 10% for 3+ years experience with 55%+ graduation marks; 15% for 5+ years experience; 20% for 10+ years experience
- **Alumni scholarship**: 20% for UPES degree programme graduates
- **Vijay (Sports) scholarship**: 35% to 100% based on national/international achievement level
- Scholarships cannot be combined with corporate MOU discounts
- Scholarship benefit applied semester-wise; eligibility confirmed at admission

EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with UPES each quarter. Please reconfirm current fees, scholarship eligibility, and EMI terms with our counsellor before any payment. Fees listed are indicative.

certificate.body: The degree certificate is issued by University of Petroleum and Energy Studies (UPES) and carries the UPES name with the MBA designation. The Marketing Management specialisation is noted on the marksheet and transcript. Online mode is identified per UGC-DEB 2020 regulations. The certificate is valid for corporate hiring, PSU eligibility, and higher education admission across India. UPES is WES recognised, making the degree suitable for international credential evaluation.

reviews.intro: Three verified reviews from UPES Online MBA Marketing Management alumni. Ratings from post-completion surveys.

items.name: Priya Sharma
items.liked: Digital Brand Management and CRM subjects were directly applicable to my digital marketing manager role. The Consumer Behaviour in Digital World framing was far more relevant than traditional CB subjects at peer programmes.
items.disliked: UPES brand is stronger in North India and energy/petroleum sectors. For South India marketing careers, additional brand-building may be needed.
items.body: I had 4 years in FMCG marketing and the UPES MBA helped me transition to a digital brand manager role at a Delhi e-commerce company. NIRF #36 in Management was a credibility point I used effectively in interviews.

items.name: Rahul Verma
items.liked: Services Marketing and Integrated Marketing Communication were well-structured. Innovation and Entrepreneurship gave good startup marketing frameworks.
items.disliked: Placement support was limited for marketing roles outside Uttarakhand. Self-sourcing was necessary for Delhi NCR roles.
items.body: Good programme for North India marketing careers. UPES brand is well recognised in Uttarakhand and Himachal Pradesh. For pan-India brand recognition, Amity or NMIMS may carry stronger reach.

items.name: Ananya Singh
items.liked: Digital Marketing subject in Sem 4 and CRM were applicable to my agency role.
items.disliked: LMS could be more interactive. Live sessions were limited to weekends and some faculty recordings felt dated.
items.body: Solid marketing credential for the fee at Rs 1,75,000. NIRF #36 Management ranking is a genuine differentiator vs many private university online programmes. Best for North India and digital marketing careers.

faqs.question: What is the total fee for UPES Online MBA Marketing Management?
faqs.answer: The total program fee is Rs 1,75,000 across 2 years. Year 1 is Rs 95,000 and Year 2 is Rs 80,000. Zero-cost EMI is available at Rs 7,292 per month for 24 months through UPES NBFC lending partners. Reconfirm current fees with our counsellor before payment.

faqs.question: What scholarships does UPES offer for Online MBA?
faqs.answer: UPES offers three main scholarship categories for online programmes: Academic/Work Experience scholarship (10% for 3+ years, 15% for 5+ years, 20% for 10+ years experience with 55%+ graduation marks), Alumni scholarship (20% for UPES graduates), and Vijay Sports scholarship (35% to 100% based on achievement level). Eligibility confirmed at admission.

faqs.question: Is UPES Online MBA valid for corporate hiring and PSU jobs?
faqs.answer: Yes. UPES is UGC-DEB approved, which means the online MBA carries the same statutory recognition as a regular MBA for corporate hiring and central government service eligibility (subject to DoPT notifications). UPES is also WES recognised for international credential evaluation.

faqs.question: How does UPES Marketing Management compare to Amity or NMIMS?
faqs.answer: UPES Marketing Management is NIRF #36 in Management (2025) - a stronger management-category rank than many peer online MBA providers at comparable or lower fees. Amity carries stronger all-India brand recognition. NMIMS carries stronger Mumbai market recognition. UPES is the stronger choice for North India marketing careers and digital-forward roles where NIRF ranking credibility matters.

faqs.question: Does UPES Online MBA Marketing cover Digital Marketing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Digital Marketing is a dedicated Sem 4 subject covering SEO, SEM, social media, email marketing, and performance analytics. Additionally, Digital Brand Management in Sem 3 and Consumer Behaviour in Digital World give the entire marketing specialisation a digital-era orientation that differentiates UPES from traditional marketing MBA programmes.

chooseIf: You want a NAAC A, NIRF #36 Management MBA with a digital-forward marketing curriculum at Rs 1,75,000.
You are targeting digital marketing, brand management, or CRM roles in North India IT services, e-commerce, or FMCG companies.
You want zero-cost EMI at Rs 7,292/month across up to 36 months with WES-recognised degree credentials.
consider: If pan-India FMCG brand management recognition is the priority, Amity Online MBA Marketing at Rs 2.25L or NMIMS Marketing carry stronger national consumer brand recognition.
If South India digital marketing careers are the goal, JAIN Online MBA Marketing from Bengaluru provides stronger South India ecosystem access.
If AI-driven marketing technology is the focus, JAIN AI for Marketing specialisation delivers more forward-looking AI-marketing curriculum.
